<?php /* * This file is part of the DebugBar package. * * (c) 2013 Maxime Bouroumeau-Fuseau * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace DebugBar; use DebugBar\DataCollector\ExceptionsCollector; use DebugBar\DataCollector\MemoryCollector; use DebugBar\DataCollector\MessagesCollector; use DebugBar\DataCollector\PhpInfoCollector; use DebugBar\DataCollector\RequestDataCollector; use DebugBar\DataCollector\TimeDataCollector; /** * Debug bar subclass which adds all included collectors */ class StandardDebugBar extends DebugBar { public function __construct() { $this->addCollector(new PhpInfoCollector()); $this->addCollector(new MessagesCollector()); $this->addCollector(new RequestDataCollector()); $this->addCollector(new TimeDataCollector()); $this->addCollector(new MemoryCollector()); $this->addCollector(new ExceptionsCollector()); } }
